name: Sandbank
description: A collaborative audiovisual project. Music by Ernesto Cisneros, video by Gino Battiston. Documentary score from the Central Desert of Mendoza, Argentina. Four ambient pieces that function as a metamodel — a bank of visual and sound images.

name: Sandbank | Ernesto Cisneros Cino
description: Sandbank: A collaborative audiovisual project with Gino Battiston. Documentary film from the Central Desert of Mendoza, Argentina.
